letter_text:
California Department of Motor Vehicles
VEHICLE REGISTRATION RENEWAL NOTICE
Vehicle: 2018 TOYOTA COROLLA
Plate: 8ABC123
Registration expires: 03/31/2026

Amount due: $215.00

Renew before your registration expires to avoid late penalties. You can renew online at dmv.ca.gov, by mail, or at a DMV office. Note: this vehicle requires a smog certification before renewal. Have your smog check completed at a licensed station, then renew.
